messages.content:
Explain the potential impacts of this vulnerability using standard terminology.

Insufficient input validation in SVC_ECC_PRIMITIVE system call in a compromised user application or ABL may allow an attacker to corrupt ASP (AMD Secure Processor) OS memory which may lead to potential loss of integrity and availability.
The vulnerability may lead to a loss of Integrity and Availability in the AMD Secure Processor operating system, potentially allowing unauthorized memory modification and system disruption.
